name: restarred
description: A full-stack TypeScript starter designed to be built on by AI coding agents

scripts.build: bun run build:client && bun run build:css
scripts.build:client: bun build ./src/client/main.ts --outdir ./dist/assets --external preact --external preact/hooks --external preact/jsx-dev-runtime --external preact/jsx-runtime
scripts.dev: bun run dev:client & bun run dev:server & bun run dev:css
scripts.dev:client: bun --watch build ./src/client/main.ts --outdir ./dist/assets --external preact --external preact/hooks --external preact/jsx-dev-runtime --external preact/jsx-runtime
scripts.test: NODE_ENV=test bun run src/server/database/cli.ts up && NODE_ENV=test bun test src
scripts.test:file: NODE_ENV=test bun run src/server/database/cli.ts up && NODE_ENV=test bun test
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck
